issues.title: No /llms.txt file found
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt at the site root with '# <Project>' + a short summary + H2 sections linking to canonical doc URLs.

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: No robots.txt found
issues.fix: Publish a /robots.txt that explicitly allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended and other AI crawlers.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: No API or OpenAPI entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Expose a public API reference or OpenAPI document at /docs/api, /openapi.json, or an equivalent developer URL so agents can understand callable surfaces.

issues.title: No FAQ section detected
issues.fix:
Add a FAQ block with ≥5 question/answer pairs using
/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No integration-safety docs detected
issues.fix: Document auth, API keys/OAuth, rate limits, webhooks, SDKs, sandbox/test mode, and status-page behavior so agents can call tools safely.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No social/authority footprint linked from header or footer
issues.fix: Add links to Wikipedia, LinkedIn company page, YouTube channel, or GitHub org so AI engines can cross-reference authority.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Consistency trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the consistency layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No clear agent navigation path detected
issues.fix: Expose a crawlable sitemap and stable navigation to docs, pricing, support, API references, and key task pages. Agents need predictable links, not only app-shell buttons.

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No last-updated signal on homepage
issues.fix: Add <time datetime='YYYY-MM-DD'>Updated ...</time> or article:modified_time meta, or expose dateModified in Article JSON-LD.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: No clear agent navigation path detected
issues.fix: Expose a crawlable sitemap and stable navigation to docs, pricing, support, API references, and key task pages. Agents need predictable links, not only app-shell buttons.

issues.title: No integration-safety docs detected
issues.fix: Document auth, API keys/OAuth, rate limits, webhooks, SDKs, sandbox/test mode, and status-page behavior so agents can call tools safely.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: Some sampled pages reference old years without strong freshness signals
issues.fix: Refresh time-sensitive pages, update year-specific references, and expose visible modified dates or machine-readable modified_time metadata.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: No CLI or command-line workflow detected
issues.fix: Add CLI install/use docs when your product can be operated from CI, terminals, or coding agents. Include copy-paste commands and JSON output examples.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: No integration-safety docs detected
issues.fix: Document auth, API keys/OAuth, rate limits, webhooks, SDKs, sandbox/test mode, and status-page behavior so agents can call tools safely.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: Weak JSON-LD for homepage page family
issues.fix: Add page-family schema for FAQPage. Strong JSON-LD should match the page type, not just include generic Organization markup.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: No last-updated signal on homepage
issues.fix: Add <time datetime='YYYY-MM-DD'>Updated ...</time> or article:modified_time meta, or expose dateModified in Article JSON-LD.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: Statistical claims are unsourced
issues.fix: Every % / 'X customers' / stat deserves an inline citation link to the origin study or publication.

issues.title: FAQ section exists but is not marked up as FAQPage JSON-LD
issues.fix: Wrap the FAQ with a FAQPage JSON-LD block so AI engines can lift the Q/A pairs verbatim.

issues.title: No robots.txt found
issues.fix: Publish a /robots.txt that explicitly allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended and other AI crawlers.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No CLI or command-line workflow detected
issues.fix: Add CLI install/use docs when your product can be operated from CI, terminals, or coding agents. Include copy-paste commands and JSON output examples.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: Article content has no Article/BlogPosting schema
issues.fix: Emit Article JSON-LD with headline, author, datePublished, dateModified.

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

details.heading_issue: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)

issues.title: No FAQ section detected
issues.fix:
Add a FAQ block with ≥5 question/answer pairs using
/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.fix: Optional: add /llms-full.txt with the expanded content concatenated inline. Some tools prefer the full version.

issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No social/authority footprint linked from header or footer
issues.fix: Add links to Wikipedia, LinkedIn company page, YouTube channel, or GitHub org so AI engines can cross-reference authority.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Some H2 topics are too short (<3 words)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: Popup or overlay patterns may suppress clean extraction
issues.fix: Delay or remove modal and overlay patterns on indexable pages, especially above-the-fold newsletter or signup gates.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: Article content has no Article/BlogPosting schema
issues.fix: Emit Article JSON-LD with headline, author, datePublished, dateModified.

issues.title: No /llms.txt file found
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt at the site root with '# <Project>' + a short summary + H2 sections linking to canonical doc URLs.

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: robots.txt blocks 8 AI bots
issues.fix: Allowlist AI crawlers in robots.txt. Start with GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended.

issues.title: Statistical claims are unsourced
issues.fix: Every % / 'X customers' / stat deserves an inline citation link to the origin study or publication.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: No FAQ section detected
issues.fix:
Add a FAQ block with ≥5 question/answer pairs using
/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: 2 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: team or founder page, pricing page.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Consistency trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the consistency layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: Some sampled pages reference old years without strong freshness signals
issues.fix: Refresh time-sensitive pages, update year-specific references, and expose visible modified dates or machine-readable modified_time metadata.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No last-updated signal on homepage
issues.fix: Add <time datetime='YYYY-MM-DD'>Updated ...</time> or article:modified_time meta, or expose dateModified in Article JSON-LD.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: No API or OpenAPI entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Expose a public API reference or OpenAPI document at /docs/api, /openapi.json, or an equivalent developer URL so agents can understand callable surfaces.

issues.title: Statistical claims are unsourced
issues.fix: Every % / 'X customers' / stat deserves an inline citation link to the origin study or publication.

issues.title: 2 linked URL(s) in llms.txt return non-200
issues.fix: Fix or remove broken links in llms.txt — crawlers will mistrust the file if samples 404.

issues.title: FAQ section exists but is not marked up as FAQPage JSON-LD
issues.fix: Wrap the FAQ with a FAQPage JSON-LD block so AI engines can lift the Q/A pairs verbatim.

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: No /llms-full.txt variant published
issues.fix: Optional: add /llms-full.txt with the expanded content concatenated inline. Some tools prefer the full version.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Found 0 H1 elements (expected exactly 1)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No /llms.txt file found
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt at the site root with '# <Project>' + a short summary + H2 sections linking to canonical doc URLs.

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: No FAQ section detected
issues.fix:
Add a FAQ block with ≥5 question/answer pairs using
/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.title: No robots.txt found
issues.fix: Publish a /robots.txt that explicitly allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended and other AI crawlers.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: No API or OpenAPI entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Expose a public API reference or OpenAPI document at /docs/api, /openapi.json, or an equivalent developer URL so agents can understand callable surfaces.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Consistency trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the consistency layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No CLI or command-line workflow detected
issues.fix: Add CLI install/use docs when your product can be operated from CI, terminals, or coding agents. Include copy-paste commands and JSON output examples.

issues.title: No clear agent navigation path detected
issues.fix: Expose a crawlable sitemap and stable navigation to docs, pricing, support, API references, and key task pages. Agents need predictable links, not only app-shell buttons.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: No integration-safety docs detected
issues.fix: Document auth, API keys/OAuth, rate limits, webhooks, SDKs, sandbox/test mode, and status-page behavior so agents can call tools safely.

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: Found 0 H1 elements (expected exactly 1)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: Content has not been updated in 231 days
issues.fix: Refresh the homepage copy and bump the dateModified / visible timestamp.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

details.heading_issue: H3 appears before first H2 (broken hierarchy)

issues.title: Homepage returns 403 for GPTBot
issues.fix: Remove WAF/CDN rules that block OpenAI's GPTBot crawler and similar AI user agents.

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: robots.txt blocks 8 AI bots
issues.fix: Allowlist AI crawlers in robots.txt. Start with GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended.

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: Statistical claims are unsourced
issues.fix: Every % / 'X customers' / stat deserves an inline citation link to the origin study or publication.

issues.title: No API or OpenAPI entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Expose a public API reference or OpenAPI document at /docs/api, /openapi.json, or an equivalent developer URL so agents can understand callable surfaces.

issues.title: No FAQ section detected
issues.fix:
Add a FAQ block with ≥5 question/answer pairs using
/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.title: Consistency trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the consistency layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: No social/authority footprint linked from header or footer
issues.fix: Add links to Wikipedia, LinkedIn company page, YouTube channel, or GitHub org so AI engines can cross-reference authority.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: Found 0 H1 elements (expected exactly 1)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: Popup or overlay patterns may suppress clean extraction
issues.fix: Delay or remove modal and overlay patterns on indexable pages, especially above-the-fold newsletter or signup gates.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: Weak JSON-LD for homepage page family
issues.fix: Add page-family schema for Organization, FAQPage. Strong JSON-LD should match the page type, not just include generic Organization markup.

issues.title: No last-updated signal on homepage
issues.fix: Add <time datetime='YYYY-MM-DD'>Updated ...</time> or article:modified_time meta, or expose dateModified in Article JSON-LD.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: No WebMCP access signal detected
issues.fix: If the site supports browser-native agent access, publish a WebMCP endpoint or discovery document and link it from developer docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: Article content has no Article/BlogPosting schema
issues.fix: Emit Article JSON-LD with headline, author, datePublished, dateModified.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: Found 0 H1 elements (expected exactly 1)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about Developer Tooling; Developer Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: Content has not been updated in 99 days

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected

issues.title: Found 0 H1 elements (expected exactly 1)

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

providers.title: [2512.24601v1] Recursive Language Modelsopen searchopen navigation menucontact arXivsubscribe to arXiv mailings
providers.description: Abstract page for arXiv paper 2512.24601v1: Recursive Language Models

providers.title: Recursive Language Models
providers.description: We study allowing large language models (LLMs) to process arbitrarily long prompts through the lens of inference-time scaling. We propose Recursive Language Models (RLMs), a general inference strategy that treats long prompts as part of an external environment and allows the LLM to programmatically examine, decompose, and recursively call itself over snippets of the prompt. We find that RLMs successfully handle inputs up to two orders of magnitude beyond model context windows and, even for shorter prompts, dramatically outperform the quality of base LLMs and common long-context scaffolds across four diverse long-context tasks, while having comparable (or cheaper) cost per query.

issues.title: No valid Organization JSON-LD
issues.fix: Add <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type:Organization including name, url, logo, and sameAs (≥3 social profiles).

issues.title: External links exist but none hit the authoritative allowlist
issues.fix: Cite at least one .edu/.gov, Wikipedia, IETF/W3C spec, or tier-1 publication near your flagship claims.

issues.title: llms.txt missing H1 title
issues.fix: Start llms.txt with '# <Project name>' as the H1 — per llmstxt.org this is the only required field.

issues.title: No definition-lead opener in the first 150 tokens
issues.fix: Open the homepage with '<Brand> is a <category> that <differentiator>' — this is the single biggest lever for AI citability.

issues.title: FAQ section exists but is not marked up as FAQPage JSON-LD
issues.fix: Wrap the FAQ with a FAQPage JSON-LD block so AI engines can lift the Q/A pairs verbatim.

issues.title: Claude readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive claude citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: Identity trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the identity layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Template coverage is limited in homepage-only scans
issues.fix: Run Template Audit, Full Site, or Deep Investigation mode to compare key templates across the site.

issues.title: Volatile content lacks update signals
issues.fix: Pages about prices, versions, launches, or changing data should expose a clear last-updated date and refresh cadence.

issues.title: Safety trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the safety layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Google ai readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive google_ai citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: 4 entity page gaps detected
issues.fix: Add explicit entity surfaces: about or company page, team or founder page, pricing page, docs or API page.

issues.title: Core meta tags are incomplete
issues.fix: Add a unique <title>, meta description, and canonical URL. Add Open Graph/Twitter tags for share and citation previews.

issues.title: Authority trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the authority layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Perplexity readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive perplexity citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No named author or byline visible
issues.fix: If the homepage surfaces editorial content, include an author byline (Person JSON-LD or 'By <Name>').

issues.title: Consistency trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the consistency layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Technical trust layer is weak
issues.fix: Strengthen the technical layer before expecting durable AI citations and stable visibility.

issues.title: Organization JSON-LD missing founder
issues.fix: Add 'founder': [{ @type: Person, name: ... }] to the Organization schema.

issues.title: Chatgpt readiness is underdeveloped
issues.fix: Improve the underlying dimensions that drive chatgpt citations: crawlability, structure, schema, freshness, entity clarity, and trust.

issues.title: No last-updated signal on homepage
issues.fix: Add <time datetime='YYYY-MM-DD'>Updated ...</time> or article:modified_time meta, or expose dateModified in Article JSON-LD.

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: Some H2 topics are too short (<3 words)
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: 2 high-impact content gaps detected
issues.fix: Prioritize: Frequently Asked Questions about AI Agent Tooling; AI Agent Tooling Glossary: Key Terms Explained.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: Popup or overlay patterns may suppress clean extraction
issues.fix: Delay or remove modal and overlay patterns on indexable pages, especially above-the-fold newsletter or signup gates.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

/ or

+

patterns. Also mark it up with FAQPage JSON-LD.

issues.fix: Every % / 'X customers' / stat deserves an inline citation link to the origin study or publication.

issues.fix: Add links to Wikipedia, LinkedIn company page, YouTube channel, or GitHub org so AI engines can cross-reference authority.

issues.title: No Portal visit layer detected
issues.fix: If the service supports temporary agent visits, publish a Portal manifest at /portal with tool metadata and a call endpoint, then link it from docs and llms.txt.

issues.title: No x402 payment support detected
issues.fix: If paid agent/API access is supported, document x402 payment flow, supported networks/tokens, payment headers, and facilitator behavior.

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials
issues.fix: Publish an About page listing founders, team, and credentials. AI engines heavily weight provenance.

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
issues.fix: Publish /llms.txt and, when relevant, a .well-known agent/plugin manifest that points agents at docs, APIs, MCP endpoints, and support policies.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected
issues.fix: Document the skills, actions, tools, or capabilities agents can use. Include names, input schemas, output shapes, auth requirements, and whether each action is read-only or writes data.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold
issues.fix: Add a 2–4 sentence paragraph immediately after the H1 summarising what the product is and who it serves.

issues.title: No CLI or command-line workflow detected

issues.title: No MCP entrypoint detected
issues.fix: Publish an MCP endpoint or setup guide, then link it from the homepage or llms.txt. Agents should be able to discover tool access without reading human-only docs.

issues.title: No 2–4 sentence summary paragraph above the fold

issues.title: No /about or /team page with credentials

issues.title: No clear self-identification in the opening paragraph
issues.fix: Open with 'We are ...' / 'Our mission is ...' / 'This is ...' — AI models need explicit entity framing.

issues.title: No agent skills or action manifest detected

issues.fix: Use exactly one H1, ensure the first H2 precedes any H3, and give every H2 a clear topic label (3+ words).

issues.title: No agent discovery file detected
